scope.method: same-site HTML crawl with deterministic evidence extraction

business.name: Basecamp
business.description: Trusted by millions, Basecamp puts everything you need to get work done in one place. It’s the calm, organized way to manage projects, work with clients, and communicate company-wide.

offerings.name: Hundreds of companies have written custom integrations, and our Integrations page links up third-party soluti...
Pick the package that fits you best.
Basecamp Free
Run one project at a time.
Basecamp Plus
Ideal for freelancers, startups, and smaller teams.
Basecamp Pro Unlimited
The same core features are included with every package.
A stable, well-run company is part of the deal, too.
How do customers feel after switching to Basecamp?
Risk-free, cancel anytime, no long-term lock-in.
A big boost for bootstrappers & small businesses.

customerActions.label: Sign in or access an account

toolsFormsLinks.label: this video shows you how it works

constraints: Treat missing, unclear, or unevidenced details as unknown.
Do not submit forms, create accounts, make purchases, or send messages without explicit user confirmation.
When citing facts to a downstream agent or user, include the source URL from evidence.
recommendedNextQuestions: Are business hours or response times published elsewhere?
